pageDescription: Calculate velocity, speed, and acceleration for various physics applications including displacement, time, and motion analysis

velocity.title: Velocity
velocity.description: A vector quantity that includes both speed and direction

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: A scalar quantity representing the rate of motion

acceleration.title: Acceleration
acceleration.description: The rate of change of velocity over time

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides physics calculations only
criticalWarningsList.units: Ensure consistent units throughout your calculations

importantNotesList: Velocity is a vector quantity with both magnitude and direction
Speed is a scalar quantity (magnitude only)
Always consider significant figures in your results
Double-check unit conversions for accurate calculations

messages.enterInformation: Enter your values to calculate velocity
messages.resultMessage: The result of your velocity calculation is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides physics calculations based on standard kinematic formulas. The accuracy of results depends on the correctness of the input values and appropriate application of the formulas.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Physics Professional
seekHelp.content: For complex physics problems or specialized applications, consider consulting a physics professional or using specialized software tools designed for advanced physics calculations.

errors.initialVelocity: Please enter a valid initial velocity
errors.finalVelocity: Please enter a valid final velocity
errors.time: Please enter a valid time value
errors.displacement: Please enter a valid displacement value
errors.acceleration: Please enter a valid acceleration value

tooltips.calculationType: Select the type of velocity calculation you need
tooltips.initialVelocity: Velocity at the start of the time interval
tooltips.finalVelocity: Velocity at the end of the time interval
tooltips.displacement: Change in position during the time interval
